# BP-102 negative variant: a status is written directly before returning.
lang: go
file: BP-102-variant-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func serve(writer http.ResponseWriter, request *http.Request) {
	result, err := load(request)
	if err != nil {
		writer.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadGateway)
		return
	}
	writer.Write(result)
}

func load(*http.Request) ([]byte, error) { return []byte("ok"), nil }
